c74object.name: ambitap.binaural~
c74object.digest: Decode a higher-order ambisonics bus to binaural stereo via SH-domain HRTF convolution (built-in MIT KEMAR or a SOFA file, orders 1-5), with head-tracking
c74object.description: Decode a higher-order ambisonics bus to binaural stereo via SH-domain HRTF convolution (built-in MIT KEMAR or a SOFA file, orders 1-5), with head-tracking.

attribute.name: roll
attribute.description: Head-tracking roll about +X (front), radians. Applied last.

attribute.name: sofa
attribute.digest: Path to a SOFA file with HRTF measurements to use instead of the built-in KEMAR set (absolute path, or resolvable in the Max search path)
attribute.description: Path to a SOFA file with HRTF measurements to use instead of the built-in KEMAR set (absolute path, or resolvable in the Max search path). An empty symbol reverts to the built-in set. Loading projects the measurements onto the SH basis at this object's order and rebuilds convolvers — not real-time safe, may glitch briefly.

attribute.name: pitch
attribute.description: Head-tracking pitch about +Y (left), radians. Applied second.

attribute.name: yaw
attribute.description: Head-tracking yaw about +Z (up), radians. Applied first.

attribute.name: hrtf_dataset
attribute.digest: Built-in HRTF projection: "ls" (default) or "magls" (better high-frequency localization)
attribute.description: Built-in HRTF projection: "ls" (default) or "magls" (better high-frequency localization). Switching rebuilds convolvers — not real-time safe, may glitch briefly.
